title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAGAYANCILLO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 175 / 55 OG No. 16, 2863 (April 20, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2103, April 03, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAGAYANCILLO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in' Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios in the Municipality of Cagayancillo, Province of Palawan, are constituted into barrios:

The sitios of Banted, Nipay, Dool, Cavili, Cabayog and Langtad to be known as the barrio of Talaga:

The sitios of Ibiok, Panderse, Lato and Gatung-an to be known as the barrio of Mampio; and

The sitio of Nusa to be known as the barrio of Nuaa.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 3, 1959.
